title: PermissionFile
description: Permission file that can define a default permission, a set of permissions or a list of inlined permissions.

default.description: The default permission set for the plugin

set.description: A list of permissions sets defined

DefaultPermission.description:
The default permission set of the plugin.

Works similarly to a permission with the "default" identifier.

description.description: Human-readable description of what the permission does. Tauri convention is to use `<h4>` headings in markdown content for Tauri documentation generation purposes.

PermissionSet.description: A set of direct permissions grouped together under a new name.

identifier.description: A unique identifier for the permission.

description.description: Human-readable description of what the permission does.

Permission.description:
Descriptions of explicit privileges of commands.

It can enable commands to be accessible in the frontend of the application.

If the scope is defined it can be used to fine grain control the access of individual or multiple commands.

identifier.description: A unique identifier for the permission.

description.description: Human-readable description of what the permission does. Tauri internal convention is to use `<h4>` headings in markdown content for Tauri documentation generation purposes.

commands.description: Allowed or denied commands when using this permission.

scope.description: Allowed or denied scoped when using this permission.

platforms.description: Target platforms this permission applies. By default all platforms are affected by this permission.

Commands.description:
Allowed and denied commands inside a permission.

If two commands clash inside of `allow` and `deny`, it should be denied by default.

Scopes.description:
An argument for fine grained behavior control of Tauri commands.

It can be of any serde serializable type and is used to allow or prevent certain actions inside a Tauri command. The configured scope is passed to the command and will be enforced by the command implementation.

## Example

```json { "allow": [{ "path": "$HOME/**" }], "deny": [{ "path": "$HOME/secret.txt" }] } ```

allow.description: Data that defines what is allowed by the scope.

deny.description: Data that defines what is denied by the scope. This should be prioritized by validation logic.

anyOf.description: Represents a map of [`String`] keys to [`Value`]s.

oneOf.description: MacOS.
Windows.
Linux.
Android.
iOS.
Enables the terminal_focus_split command without any pre-configured scope.

oneOf.markdownDescription: Enables the terminal_new command without any pre-configured scope.

oneOf.description: Denies the terminal_new command without any pre-configured scope.
oneOf.markdownDescription: Denies the terminal_new command without any pre-configured scope.

oneOf.description: Enables the terminal_set_color_scheme command without any pre-configured scope.
oneOf.markdownDescription: Enables the terminal_set_color_scheme command without any pre-configured scope.

oneOf.description: Denies the terminal_set_color_scheme command without any pre-configured scope.
oneOf.markdownDescription: Denies the terminal_set_color_scheme command without any pre-configured scope.

oneOf.description: Enables the terminal_split command without any pre-configured scope.

oneOf.description:
Default permissions for the ghostty terminal plugin.
#### This default permission set includes:

- `allow-terminal-new`
- `allow-terminal-set-color-scheme`
- `allow-terminal-split`
- `allow-terminal-focus-split`
- `allow-terminal-new-tab`
- `allow-terminal-focus-tab`
- `allow-terminal-close-tab`
- `allow-terminal-list-tabs`
- `allow-terminal-set-chrome-inset`
- `allow-terminal-set-close-window-on-last-tab`
- `allow-terminal-set-traffic-lights-hidden`
oneOf.markdownDescription:
Default permissions for the ghostty terminal plugin.
#### This default permission set includes:

- `allow-terminal-new`
- `allow-terminal-set-color-scheme`
- `allow-terminal-split`
- `allow-terminal-focus-split`
- `allow-terminal-new-tab`
- `allow-terminal-focus-tab`
- `allow-terminal-close-tab`
- `allow-terminal-list-tabs`
- `allow-terminal-set-chrome-inset`
- `allow-terminal-set-close-window-on-last-tab`
- `allow-terminal-set-traffic-lights-hidden`

oneOf.description: Allows creating a new terminal surface attached to a window.
oneOf.markdownDescription: Allows creating a new terminal surface attached to a window.

oneOf.description: Allows setting the dark/light color scheme on the ghostty app.
oneOf.markdownDescription: Allows setting the dark/light color scheme on the ghostty app.

oneOf.description: Allows splitting an existing terminal surface.
oneOf.markdownDescription: Allows splitting an existing terminal surface.

oneOf.description: Allows moving keyboard focus between split panes.
oneOf.markdownDescription: Allows moving keyboard focus between split panes.

oneOf.description: Allows creating a new tab (a fresh GhosttyHostView + surface mounted in the tab container).
oneOf.markdownDescription: Allows creating a new tab (a fresh GhosttyHostView + surface mounted in the tab container).

oneOf.description: Allows switching the active tab by id.
oneOf.markdownDescription: Allows switching the active tab by id.

oneOf.description: Allows closing a tab by id (frees the surfaces under that tab).
oneOf.markdownDescription: Allows closing a tab by id (frees the surfaces under that tab).

oneOf.description: Allows enumerating currently mounted tabs.
oneOf.markdownDescription: Allows enumerating currently mounted tabs.

oneOf.description: Allows the HTML side to push its measured chrome insets so the native tab content area is sized correctly.
oneOf.markdownDescription: Allows the HTML side to push its measured chrome insets so the native tab content area is sized correctly.

oneOf.description: Toggles the policy of whether closing the last tab also closes the window. Default true; embedders override.
oneOf.markdownDescription: Toggles the policy of whether closing the last tab also closes the window. Default true; embedders override.

oneOf.description: Hides or shows the macOS standard window buttons (close/minimize/zoom). Used by hosts to enter true distraction-free mode.
oneOf.markdownDescription: Hides or shows the macOS standard window buttons (close/minimize/zoom). Used by hosts to enter true distraction-free mode.
